bullets: Mutual fund exit load is a fee charged by the mutual fund house when an investor redeems their units before a specified period
The exit load is deducted from the redemption proceeds and the remaining amount is paid to the investor
The exit load percentage and period vary across different mutual fund schemes
The Securities and Exchange Board of India regulates the exit load structure for mutual funds in India
Investors can check the exit load details in the mutual fund scheme information document or on the mutual fund website
The exit load is subject to change as per the mutual fund scheme's terms and conditions
